heading: Transfer of funds among Federal agencies
label: 15308 Transfer of funds among Federal agencies
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 15308 was renumbered .section 15309 of this title

children.heading: .—In General
children.label: a .—In General
children.text: Subject to subsection (c), for purposes of this subtitle, each Commission may transfer funds to and accept transfers of funds from other Federal agencies.

children.heading: .—Transfer of Funds to Other Federal Agencies
children.label: b .—Transfer of Funds to Other Federal Agencies
children.text: Funds made available to a Commission may be transferred to other Federal agencies if the funds are used consistently with the purposes for which the funds were specifically authorized and appropriated.

children.heading: .—Transfer of Funds From Other Federal Agencies
children.label: c .—Transfer of Funds From Other Federal Agencies

children.text: the statutory authority for the funds provided by the Federal agency does not expressly prohibit use of funds for authorities being carried out by a Commission; and
the Federal agency that provides the funds determines that the activities for which the funds are to be used are otherwise eligible for funding under such a statutory authority.
